headline: Synchrony Announces Executive Leadership Changes to Advance Digital Growth, Customer Experience and AI Momentum
summary: Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a premier consumer financial services company, today announced executive leadership changes in its Digital platform and Technology and Operations organizations.

headline: Synchrony Financial: A Resilient Preferred For Rate Uncertainty
summary: Synchrony Financial offers Series B fixed-rate reset preferreds, SYF.PR.B, with an 8.25% coupon. Read more about SYF stock and its preferred SYF.PR.B here.
